englishDefinition: adds another related point
chineseTranslation: 也；加入另一個相關重點

englishDefinition: adds extra information
chineseTranslation: 此外；補充額外資訊

englishDefinition: adds a supporting point in formal writing
chineseTranslation: 而且；在較正式寫作中補充支持觀點

englishDefinition: introduces an opposite or limiting point
chineseTranslation: 然而；引出相反或限制性的觀點

englishDefinition: shows a clear difference between ideas
chineseTranslation: 相較之下；顯示兩個想法的明顯差異

englishDefinition: joins two facts that are different
chineseTranslation: 然而；連接兩個相反或不同的事實

englishDefinition: introduces a fact that makes the main idea surprising
chineseTranslation: 雖然；引出讓主要內容形成轉折的事實

englishDefinition: means although with stronger emphasis
chineseTranslation: 即使；比 although 更強調讓步

englishDefinition: introduces a noun that does not prevent the result
chineseTranslation: 儘管；後面接名詞而非完整子句

englishDefinition: introduces the reason for something
chineseTranslation: 因為；後面接完整原因子句

englishDefinition: means because when giving a reason
chineseTranslation: 由於；表示原因時等同 because

englishDefinition: introduces a logical conclusion or result
chineseTranslation: 因此；引出合理結論或結果

englishDefinition: shows what happened because of something
chineseTranslation: 結果；說明前面事件造成的後果

englishDefinition: shows a formal cause-and-result relationship
chineseTranslation: 因此；較正式地表示因果結果

englishDefinition: introduces one example that supports an idea
chineseTranslation: 例如；引出支持觀點的一個例子

englishDefinition: has the same use as for example
chineseTranslation: 舉例來說；用法與 for example 相同

englishDefinition: introduces examples after a noun
chineseTranslation: 例如；接在名詞後列出例子

englishDefinition: introduces the first point or step
chineseTranslation: 首先；引出第一個重點或步驟

englishDefinition: introduces the following point or step
chineseTranslation: 接著；引出下一個重點或步驟

englishDefinition: introduces the last point or step
chineseTranslation: 最後；引出最後一點或步驟

englishDefinition: shows that two ideas are alike
chineseTranslation: 同樣地；顯示兩個想法相似

englishDefinition: places one thing beside another for comparison
chineseTranslation: 與……相比；把兩件事放在一起比較

englishDefinition: introduces a condition that may produce a result
chineseTranslation: 如果；引出可能造成結果的條件

englishDefinition: introduces the main general conclusion
chineseTranslation: 整體而言；引出主要的總結
